Mixed martial arts events
2011 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 10, 2011
Last dateDecember 18, 2011
Events
Total events22
Fights
Total fights195
Title fights5
Chronology
2010 in Shooto 2011 in Shooto 2012 in Shooto

The year 2011 is the 23rd year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2011 Shooto held 22 events beginning with, Shooto: Shootor's Legacy 1.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2011
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Bantamweight Koetsu Okazaki def. Shuichiro Katsumura (c) TKO (Punches) 2 2:24 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 2011 [a]
Strawweight Junji Ikoma def. Junji Ito Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 2011 [b]
Lightweight Kuniyoshi Hironaka def. Kotetsu Boku Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Shootor's Legacy 3 [c]
Flyweight Yasuhiro Urushitani (c) def. Yuki Shoujou TKO (Head Kick and Punches) 2 0:24 Shooto: Shootor's Legacy 3 [d]
Strawweight Mikihito Yamagami def. Junji Ikoma (c) KO (Punch) 1 0:41 Shooto: Shooto the Shoot 2011 [e]
  1. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Strawweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Lightweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Flyweight Championship.
  5. ^ For the Strawweight Championship.
